creator: owen@easytarget.me.uk
text:
On 2013-12-25 11:33, Max Brazhnikov wrote:
> I've recently added bin/vwebp to plist, because the port failed at my
> poudriere. Could you show configure output?
> 
> Max

Max, thanks, sorry for my tardy reply, family priorities.
Here is what I have, I'm guessing the last line is the one that is of 
interest to you.
